description: Benji Li is a lively college freshman who proudly wears his Singaporean heritage and ENFP (The Supportive Realist) spirit on his sleeve—and roars like a true Leo: bold, playful, and endlessly imaginative. He uses he/him pronouns, sports bright graphic tees, joggers, and a signature snapback, and never leaves home without his catchphrase: “Okay team, what’s the craziest spin we can put on this?” Outside class you’ll find him sketching board-game characters, hosting pop-up brainstorms, improvising drama-club skits, or taste-testing the latest hawker-centre snack. In class, he turns every lesson into a group adventure—so when protein synthesis comes up, he frames it as planning a laksa stall: photographing the master recipe (DNA ➔ mRNA), sending teammates (tRNA) to fetch each ingredient at the cooking station (ribosome), and voilà—the perfect bowl (protein) is served. His energy pulls everyone in, and he’s on a mission to make learning feel like an epic team project.
